_comments.REPLACE_WITH_SOLANA_MAILBOX_PROGRAM_ID: Option A: 75HBBLae3ddeneJVrZeyrDfv6vb7SMC3aCpBucSXS5aR (official) | Option B: your deployed mailbox program ID
_comments.REPLACE_WITH_SOLANA_IGP_PROGRAM_ID: Option A: 5p7Hii6CJL4xGBYYTGEQmH9LnUSZteFJUu9AVLDExZX2 (official) | Option B: your deployed IGP program ID
_comments.REPLACE_WITH_SOLANA_VALIDATOR_ANNOUNCE_P: Option A: 8qNYSi9EP1xSnRjtMpyof88A26GBbdcrsa61uSaHiwx3 (official) | Option B: your deployed validator_announce program ID
_comments.REPLACE_WITH_RELAYER_SOL_PUBKEY: Solana pubkey of the relayer's payer wallet (used to pay Solana tx fees)
_comments.REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_PRIVATE_KEY: EVM hex private key (0x...) for the validator and relayer signer on pruvtest
_comments.allowlocalcheckpointsyncers: Set to true only for local development; for testnet use S3 or GCS checkpoint storage
_comments.gaspaymentenforcement: Set to minimum for testnet; in production use {type:'minimum',payment:'1'}
